title: Graffiti City Mural
summary: Massive street-art mural - bold spray-paint character on a brick wall, urban grit.
prompt: A massive street-art mural covering an entire brick warehouse wall in a gritty urban alley: a bold spray-paint character with stylized geometric shapes, drips and tags layered around the edges, electric neon-pink, lime green, royal blue, and chrome silver paint. Sunlight catching the wall at an angle. A solitary skater silhouetted in the foreground for scale. Banksy meets KAWS energy, photographed on a wide lens. Editorial street-photography style.
